text:
Perfect! Now the app will work even with CORS blocking Rango:

1. **Solana chain** will appear in the chain selector
2. **Solana tokens** (SOL, USDC, USDT) will load instantly
3. **When you swap**, it will still try to use Rango's quote/swap API (which should work for the actual swap execution)

The CORS issue only affects loading metadata - the actual swap execution should work fine. Try selecting Solana as the destination chain now - you should see SOL, USDC, and USDT tokens available!
